steps.objective: Translate the owner's direction into scoped product and architecture decisions
acceptance_criteria: Owner direction is decomposed into actionable work
Architecture and delivery constraints are captured

steps.objective: Create implementation outputs and test-ready validation guidance
acceptance_criteria: Validation guidance covers the core quality risks

steps.objective: Turn the approved work into an execution-ready delivery plan and final summary
acceptance_criteria: Execution order, checkpoints, and risks are explicit
